calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Plaintiff: Kenneth D. Robin, Esq., present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Eric Brill as follows:
Damages $20,986.04
Costs $393.50
Judgment signed in open court.
